---
output-file: index
title: Introduction to git and GitHub
subtitle: ICCS Summer School 2026
footer: ICCS Summer School 2026

authors:
  - name: Marion Weinzierl
    orcid: 0000-0002-2302-5476
    affiliations: ICCS - University of Cambridge
  - name: Sam Avis
    orcid: 0000-0001-9637-9489
    affiliations: ICCS - University of Cambridge
date: "2026-07-13"

format:
  revealjs:
    logo: images/logo_cu_iccs.png
    theme: [default, custom.scss]
    embed-resources: false

    smaller: true
    slide-number: false
    incremental: false
    history: false
    chalkboard: false
    preview-links: auto

    highlight-style: github
    code-overflow: scroll
    code-line-numbers: false

revealjs-plugins:
   - attribution
---
{{< include _intro.qmd >}}

<!-- introduction, status, add, commit, log  -->
{{< include _basics.qmd >}}

<!-- branching  -->
{{< include _branching.qmd >}}

<!-- cloning  -->
{{< include _cloning.qmd >}}

<!-- outcomes, final thoughts, additional material  -->
{{< include _closing.qmd >}}
